title: サイレンススズカ、覚醒④

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's October. Taiki Shuttle goes wild along with
the crowd as the top Umamusume on the scene
sprints full speed ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Otherworldly Front-Runner, Silence Suzuka,
takes the glory with her daring runaway style!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fully captivated by her performance, a swarm of
fans gather near the winner's circle to celebrate
her victory.
